title: Allow Filters View Preference Saving (Similar to Row Height)

posts.author: mattczh (Matthew Chan)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Hope to allow staff to save private filters in the same ‘preferences’ as the row height, even on locked views.

Problem now is if the connection to chrome is refreshed due to memory leaks, the filter settings may reset if they navigate off the page.

Bonus if we can lock the ability to show certain columns via the filters, when the hide main table feature goes live.

What are you trying to achieve

View saving flexibility without exposing backend columns to inexperienced staff.
